title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic has partnered with SpaceX to access Colossus, a large GPU cluster, addressing a key weakness: lack of vertical integration in chips and infrastructure compared to other frontier AI labs. The video argues that the real AI competition is shifting from benchmarks to control of chips, energy, and datacenter infrastructure.
